title: Ship Scalable Graphics with Intentional Names
summary: SVG can be loaded as an external image or embedded inline. Inline SVG exposes its internal structure to the document and can receive an accessible name; decorative SVG should be hidden from assistive technology. A viewBox defines scalable coordinates independently of rendered size. Predict, inspect, explain, and apply the contract in a cumulative public-information build.
objectives: Explain html svg with source and browser evidence.
Apply html svg without discarding earlier document work.
Diagnose the named misconception in a changed public-service scenario.

options.text: Service availability icon system case 1: removing the viewBox makes an SVG scale more reliably across containers.
Service availability icon system case 1: choose an embedding method deliberately, provide a name for meaningful graphics, and hide decorative graphics.
Service availability icon system case 1: every decorative path needs role img and a spoken title.
